title: feat: klein multi-image editing via multipart endpoint
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Four times the inspiration
gist.blurb: The Klein model now supports up to four reference images for image-to-image generation. We switched to a new multipart endpoint to handle the extra pixels smoothly.
gist.summary: Upgraded the Klein model's image-to-image pipeline to use a multipart endpoint, enabling support for up to four parallel reference images.
gist.impact: Users can now blend and reference multiple images at once when generating with the Klein model.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about multi-image editing (up to 4 images) for the Klein model. Visual symbols: 4 picture frames or canvases, the bee mascot (Polly) painting or organizing them, and the Monitor Robot helping out with the new 'multipart' data.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hovering in front of four glowing picture frames on a wooden easel. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a palette of colors. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
